eng_desc:
You don't win fights, your machines do. Set up a Sentry Gun, drop a Dispenser to keep the team fed, and never get left without your gear.

##Equip a Sentry Gun (or Silenced Sentry Gun) as your deployable to get the most from this deck.##
eng_1_desc:
You pack a portable Dispenser instead of a grenade.

Replaces your throwable with the ##Dispenser##: a deployable that heals and resupplies you and nearby teammates. Recharges on a cooldown.
eng_3_desc:
Your gear looks after itself.

When your sentry gun is destroyed, it is ##refunded to your inventory## so you can redeploy it.
Your sentry guns gain ##60%## more health.
eng_4_desc:
You gain ##+1## concealment.
When wearing armor, your movement speed is ##15%## less affected.
You gain ##45%## more experience when you complete days and jobs.
eng_5_desc:
An upgraded support module.

Allies standing in your Dispenser's field take ##15%## less damage.
Your sentry guns carry ##50%## more ammunition.
eng_6_desc: Increases your ammo pickup to ##135%## of the normal rate.
eng_7_desc:
Your sentries' work pays off.

When one of your sentries is destroyed or recalled, you gain refilled ammo and a short damage surge based on how many kills it scored.
Your sentry guns deal ##50%## more damage.
eng_8_desc:
You do ##5%## more damage. Does not apply to melee, throwables, grenade launchers or the HRL-7.
Increases your doctor bag interaction speed by ##20%##.
eng_9_desc:
A good Engineer never stays put.

You can ##recall## a deployed sentry into your inventory and redeploy it anywhere with no cooldown.
You can carry ##+1## additional sentry gun, and your sentries fire ##armor-piercing## rounds.

Deck Completion Bonus: your sentries deal an extra ##50%## damage.
bm_ability_eng_dispenser_desc: A deployable support module that heals and resupplies nearby teammates. Recharges on a cooldown.
